alignments.preprint_claim_text: The proposed approach using graph neural networks can produce continuous atom embeddings for predicting valence and nonbonded parameters.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed approach using graph neural networks can produce continuous atom embeddings for predicting valence and nonbonded parameters.
alignments.rationale: The publication repeats the contribution about continuous atom embeddings produced by GNNs verbatim.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: This method allows for the construction, extension, and application of new force fields to arbitrary molecules in a modular and differentiable manner.
alignments.pub_claim_text: This method allows for the construction, extension, and application of new force fields to arbitrary molecules in a modular and end-to-end differentiable manner.
alignments.rationale: The publication adds the qualifier 'end-to-end' differentiable, clarifying the differentiability aspect while keeping the same overall contribution.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The approach can accurately reproduce and extend existing molecular mechanics force fields.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The espaloma model can deliver high-quality partial atomic charges significantly faster than current best practices with low inaccuracy.
alignments.rationale: The publication narrows the preprint's broader claim about reproducing/extending force fields to a specific, measurable result focused on partial atomic charges and speed, altering the original breadth of the claim.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The espaloma model demonstrates superior accuracy in computing relative alchemical free energy calculations compared to traditional methods.
alignments.pub_claim_text: When trained on a specific dataset, the espaloma model demonstrates superior accuracy in computing relative alchemical free energy calculations compared to existing methods.
alignments.rationale: The publication qualifies the free-energy accuracy claim by specifying the condition of being trained on a particular dataset, which narrows scope and tempers general confidence.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Covariate shift adaptation yields good generalization performance when domains differ only by the marginal distribution of features.
alignments.pub_claim_text: Covariate shift adaptation yields good generalization performance when domains differ only by the marginal distribution of features.
alignments.rationale: The publication restates this core result identically to the preprint.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Effective sample size, dimensionality, and model performance/generalization are formally related in supervised learning in the context of covariate shift adaptation.
alignments.pub_claim_text: Effective sample size (ESS), dimensionality, and model performance/generalization are formally related in supervised learning.
alignments.rationale: The publication retains the formal relationship between ESS, dimensionality, and performance as asserted in the preprint.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Dimensionality reduction or feature selection can increase the effective sample size.
alignments.pub_claim_text: Dimensionality reduction or feature selection can increase the effective sample size (ESS).
alignments.rationale: The result about dimensionality reduction increasing ESS is presented the same way in the publication.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The results support dimensionality reduction before covariate shift adaptation as a good practice.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The results support dimensionality reduction before covariate shift adaptation as a good practice.
alignments.rationale: The publication keeps the same practical recommendation but lists it with slightly lower stated certainty (medium vs high), so confidence is tempered.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The proposed approach to approximate the gain function of the feedback particle filter demonstrates good scaling properties with the number of particles.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed approach to approximate the gain function of the feedback particle filter demonstrates good scaling properties with the number of particles.
alignments.rationale: The publication repeats this scalability result directly from the preprint.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The representation power of neural networks indicates that the algorithm is potentially applicable to solve high-dimensional problems.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The representation power of neural networks indicates that the algorithm is potentially applicable to solve high-dimensional problems.
alignments.rationale: The publication retains the same conclusion about applicability to high-dimensional problems based on neural network representation power.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The optimization problem posed for learning the weights of the neural network is based on a certain variational formulation of the Poisson equation.
alignments.pub_claim_text: The optimization problem posed for learning the weights of the neural network is based on a certain variational formulation of the Poisson equation.
alignments.rationale: The publication preserves the methodological contribution regarding the variational formulation for the optimization problem.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Constrained low-rank matrix approximations are powerful linear dimensionality reduction techniques for extracting information from large data sets. (certainty=high, type=conclusion)
alignments.pub_claim_text: Constrained low-rank matrix approximations are powerful linear dimensionality reduction techniques. (certainty=high, type=conclusion)
alignments.rationale: The publication repeats the same core claim about constrained low-rank approximations as a powerful linear dimensionality reduction technique; the publication wording is slightly shorter but the meaning is the same.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Low-rank approaches are unable to mine complex, interleaved features that underlie hierarchical semantics. (certainty=high, type=conclusion)
alignments.rationale: The negative claim about low-rank approaches' inability to capture hierarchical semantics does not appear in the published claim set.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Deep matrix factorization (deep MF) has been shown to reach outstanding performances on unsupervised tasks. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.pub_claim_text: Deep matrix factorization (deep MF) has been shown to reach outstanding performances on unsupervised tasks. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.rationale: The publication repeats this performance claim verbatim.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Deep MF is conceptually close to some neural networks paradigms and was motivated by the success of deep learning. (certainty=medium, type=conclusion)
alignments.pub_claim_text: Deep MF is likely to become an important paradigm in unsupervised learning in the next few years. (certainty=medium, type=conclusion)
alignments.rationale: The publication replaces a conceptual/motivational statement with a forward-looking claim about future importance; the ideas are related but the message changes from motivation/analogy to prediction.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Handcrafted features with large freedom degrees in shape and space have better performance in pedestrian detection. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.pub_claim_text: Handcrafted features with large freedom degrees in shape and space have better performance in pedestrian detection. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.rationale: The publication restates this result unchanged.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Feature enhanced, part-aware, and post-processing methods have attracted main attention in deep features based approaches for pedestrian detection. (certainty=medium, type=result)
alignments.pub_claim_text: Feature enhanced, part-aware, and post-processing methods have attracted main attention in deep features based approaches for pedestrian detection. (certainty=medium, type=result)
alignments.rationale: The publication repeats this characterization of main attention areas in the field.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: Multi-spectral pedestrian detection provides more robust features for illumination variance. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.pub_claim_text: Multi-spectral pedestrian detection provides more robust features for illumination variance. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.rationale: Identical claim present in the publication.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The survey emphasizes open problems that need to be addressed in the field of pedestrian detection. (certainty=medium, type=conclusion)
alignments.pub_claim_text: The survey emphasizes open problems that need to be addressed in the field of pedestrian detection. (certainty=medium, type=conclusion)
alignments.rationale: The publication retains this concluding emphasis on open problems.

alignments.pub_claim_text: A multi-modal machine learning based automatic recognition toolkit for early stages of dementia among BSL users combines features from several parts of the body contributing to the sign envelope. (certainty=high, type=contribution)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The proposed technique is language independent and can be applied to users of any sign language. (certainty=high, type=contribution)
alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed technique is language independent and can be applied to users of any sign language. (certainty=high, type=contribution)
alignments.rationale: The publication preserves this contribution claim verbatim.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The approach is not over-fitted and has the potential to scale up despite the limited amount of training and testing data available. (certainty=medium, type=result)
alignments.pub_claim_text: The approach is not over-fitted and has the potential to scale up despite the limited amount of training and testing data available. (certainty=medium, type=result)
alignments.rationale: The publication keeps this methodological/result claim unchanged.

alignments.preprint_claim_text: An AI-based model was devised for estimating age from mammogram images. (certainty=high, type=contribution)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The proposed model was validated using logistic and linear regression models on an independent data set. (certainty=high, type=conclusion)
alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed model demonstrates advantages over traditional methods when validated on an independent data set. (certainty=medium, type=conclusion)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: This paper introduces the free-access Mini-DDSM data set. (certainty=high, type=contribution)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The proposed method FOO-VB outperforms existing methods in task agnostic scenarios. (certainty=high, type=result)
alignments.pub_claim_text: FOO-VB outperforms existing methods in task-agnostic scenarios. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: FOO-VB can handle non-stationary data distribution using a fixed architecture and without access to previous data. (certainty=high, type=conclusion)
alignments.pub_claim_text: The algorithm can handle nonstationary data distribution using a fixed architecture without access to previous data. (certainty=medium, type=conclusion)

alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed algorithm (FOO-VB) effectively approximates the online Bayes update for continual learning. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.pub_claim_text: A semi-supervised approach called Background Adaptive Faster R-CNN improves threat recognition in carry-on luggage using both labeled and unlabeled data. (certainty=high, type=contribution)

alignments.pub_claim_text: The proposed method reduces false alarm rates by matching the statistics of extracted features from hand-collected backgrounds to real-world data. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.pub_claim_text: Rewarding those that follow safety measures may increase development speed while ensuring safe choices. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The findings provide valuable insights into regulatory actions suitable to improve safety compliance during technological shifts. (certainty=medium, type=contribution)
alignments.pub_claim_text: The findings provide insights into regulatory actions that improve safety compliance during technological shifts. (certainty=medium, type=contribution)

alignments.pub_claim_text: LSVM along with Ensemble Bagged Trees (EBT) achieved a 10x reduction in the False Negative Rate using the Learning from Mistakes methodology. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.preprint_claim_text: The study demonstrates the effectiveness of low-rank matrix approximation methods in thermography for detecting subsurface thermal patterns. (certainty=high, type=result)

alignments.pub_claim_text: The performance of the DCNNs surpassed that of support-vector machines (SVMs) and filter bank canonical correlation analysis (FBCCA) in classifying steady-state visually evoked potentials (SSVEP) signals. (certainty=high, type=conclusion)
